name: coTfsArrToD
title: coTfsArrToD
syntax: dword coTfsArrToD( byte inByteArray[], dword arraysize );
description: The function converts the content of a byte array into a dword value.

parameters.name: inByteArray[]
parameters.description: Array containing the bytes to be converted, recommended array size: 4 byte.

return: Converted value or 0 if parameters are invalid.
